tasks.subject: Add Splitter ABC + registry helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce the `Splitter` ABC and `register_splitter`/`get_splitter` registry helpers so plugins have a contract to implement and the orchestrator has a lookup path.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py` (insert `Splitter` ABC after `ModelProfileProvider` around line 260)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/registry.py` (add `_splitters` dict + `register_splitter` + `get_splitter` after the store helpers around line 146)
- Create: `tests/core/test_splitter.py` (tests T1, T9–T11 from spec §8)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Splitter ABC importable from kinoforge.core.interfaces
- Splitter has abstract split(prompt, profile, params) -> list[Segment]
- Abstract Splitter subclass without override raises TypeError on instantiation
- register_splitter + get_splitter exist matching engine/provider shape
- get_splitter unknown raises UnknownAdapter naming the key
- Re-registration under same name overwrites prior factory

**Verify:** `pixi run test -- tests/core/test_splitter.py -q && pixi run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/registry.py", "tests/core/test_splitter.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/core/test_splitter.py -q && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Splitter ABC importable from kinoforge.core.interfaces", "Splitter has abstract split(prompt, profile, params) -> list[Segment]", "Abstract Splitter subclass without override raises TypeError on instantiation", "register_splitter + get_splitter exist matching engine/provider shape", "get_splitter unknown raises UnknownAdapter naming the key", "Re-registration under same name overwrites prior factory"]}
```

tasks.subject: Implement HeuristicSplitter + self-registration trigger
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the in-core default splitter (`\n\n` markers, paragraph-per-segment) and guarantee its self-registration fires whenever core is imported.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/splitter.py` (`HeuristicSplitter` + module-footer registration)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/__init__.py` (add the import that triggers registration)
- Extend: `tests/core/test_splitter.py` (tests T2–T8, T12 from spec §8)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Single-paragraph prompt -> 1 Segment with that prompt
- 'a\n\nb' -> 2 Segments ['a', 'b']
- Runs of newlines collapse (no empty middle segments)
- Whitespace stripped per segment
- In-paragraph single newline preserved
- All-whitespace prompt raises ValueError
- Segments have empty assets and params; caller params not mutated
- registry.get_splitter('heuristic')() returns HeuristicSplitter instance

**Verify:** `pixi run test -- tests/core/test_splitter.py -q && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/core/splitter.py src/kinoforge/core/__init__.py tests/core/test_splitter.py`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/splitter.py", "src/kinoforge/core/__init__.py", "tests/core/test_splitter.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/core/test_splitter.py -q && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/core/splitter.py src/kinoforge/core/__init__.py tests/core/test_splitter.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Single-paragraph prompt -> 1 Segment with that prompt", "'a\\n\\nb' -> 2 Segments ['a', 'b']", "Runs of newlines collapse (no empty middle segments)", "Whitespace stripped per segment", "In-paragraph single newline preserved", "All-whitespace prompt raises ValueError", "Segments have empty assets and params; caller params not mutated", "registry.get_splitter('heuristic')() returns HeuristicSplitter instance"]}
```

tasks.subject: Add SplitterConfig to pydantic Config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose splitter selection in YAML via an optional `splitter:` block defaulting to `"heuristic"`. All existing example configs continue to parse with no edits.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py` (add `SplitterConfig` model + `splitter: SplitterConfig = Field(default_factory=SplitterConfig)` on `Config`)
- Extend: `tests/core/test_config.py` (tests C-1, C-2, C-3 from spec §8)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Config() without splitter -> cfg.splitter.kind == 'heuristic'
- YAML with explicit kind: heuristic parses identically
- YAML with unknown kind parses at load time (error deferred to generate())
- All four example configs still parse via tests/test_examples.py

**Verify:** `pixi run test -- tests/core/test_config.py tests/test_examples.py -q && pixi run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/core/test_config.py tests/test_examples.py -q && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Config() without splitter -> cfg.splitter.kind == 'heuristic'", "YAML with explicit kind: heuristic parses identically", "YAML with unknown kind parses at load time (error deferred to generate())", "All four example configs still parse via tests/test_examples.py"]}
```

tasks.subject: Wire splitter into orchestrator.generate() step 6
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the DEFERRED splitter stub in `orchestrator.generate()` with a real registry-resolved splitter call. Attach `validated.assets` to segment 0 only. Pass the resulting list as `segments_override` to `stage.run`. Update README + PROGRESS.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py` (replace DEFERRED comment block around line 404; ensure `validate_request` runs exactly once; thread `segments_override` into `stage.run` around line 480; add `import dataclasses` if missing)
- Extend: `tests/core/test_orchestrator.py` (tests O-1 through O-4 from spec §8)
- Modify: `README.md` (mention splitter axis in Extending; remove splitter from Deferred/Roadmap)
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (add Post-MVP / Phase 10 section with the four task commit refs)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Multi-paragraph prompt -> N-element segments_override
- i2v + multi-para + asset -> seg 0 has asset; seg 1..N-1 assets empty
- Single-paragraph + asset -> 1 Segment carrying the asset (regression)
- Config without splitter block runs with heuristic default
- DEFERRED comment block at orchestrator.py:404 removed
- validate_request called exactly once per generate()
- PROGRESS.md records four new tasks with commit refs
- README.md mentions splitter axis in Extending; splitter removed from Roadmap

**Verify:** `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run test-cov`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py", "README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run test-cov", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Multi-paragraph prompt -> N-element segments_override", "i2v + multi-para + asset -> seg 0 has asset; seg 1..N-1 assets empty", "Single-paragraph + asset -> 1 Segment carrying the asset (regression)", "Config without splitter block runs with heuristic default", "DEFERRED comment block at orchestrator.py:404 removed", "validate_request called exactly once per generate()", "PROGRESS.md records four new tasks with commit refs", "README.md mentions splitter axis in Extending; splitter removed from Roadmap"]}
```
